response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems programming ability, but the absence of proven work with routing tiles, map data transformation, or low-latency geospatial processing raises significant gaps.
strengths: Demonstrated geospatial project experience via open-source GISCollective
Strong systems programming background with DLang and low-latency systems
Proven ability to work across stacks and learn new technologies independently
concerns: No visible C++ or Rust experience in commercial or navigation contexts
Lacks evidence of routing tile systems, map data optimization, or real-time traffic integration
Primary tech stack (Node.js, DLang) diverges significantly from required C++ core
